header.description: Fetches data from Salesforce and starts the workflow on specified polling intervals.

pollTimes.description: Time at which polling should occur

hour.description: The hour of the day to trigger (24h format)

minute.description: The minute of the day to trigger

dayOfMonth.description: The day of the month to trigger

cronExpression.description:
Use custom cron expression. Values and ranges as follows:
  • Seconds: 0-59
  • Minutes: 0 - 59
  • Hours: 0 - 23
  • Day of Month: 1 - 31
  • Months: 0 - 11 (Jan - Dec)
  • Day of Week: 0 - 6 (Sun - Sat)

value.description: All how many X minutes/hours it should trigger

unit.description: If it should trigger all X minutes or hours

hour.description: The hour of the day to trigger (24h format)

minute.description: The minute of the day to trigger

dayOfMonth.description: The day of the month to trigger

cronExpression.description:
Use custom cron expression. Values and ranges as follows:
  • Seconds: 0-59
  • Minutes: 0 - 59
  • Hours: 0 - 23
  • Day of Month: 1 - 31
  • Months: 0 - 11 (Jan - Dec)
  • Day of Week: 0 - 6 (Sun - Sat)

value.description: All how many X minutes/hours it should trigger

unit.description: If it should trigger all X minutes or hours

triggerOn.description: Which Salesforce event should trigger the node

accountCreated.description: When a new account is created

accountUpdated.description: When an existing account is modified

attachmentCreated.description: When a file is uploaded and attached to an object

attachmentUpdated.description: When an existing file is modified

caseCreated.description: When a new case is created

caseUpdated.description: When an existing case is modified

contactCreated.description: When a new contact is created

contactUpdated.description: When an existing contact is modified

customObjectCreated.description: When a new object of a given type is created

customObjectUpdated.description: When an object of a given type is modified

leadCreated.description: When a new lead is created

leadUpdated.description: When an existing lead is modified

opportunityCreated.description: When a new opportunity is created

opportunityUpdated.description: When an existing opportunity is modified

taskCreated.description: When a new task is created

taskUpdated.description: When an existing task is modified

userCreated.description: When a new user is created

userUpdated.description: When an existing user is modified

customObject.description: Name of the custom object. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.
